home · work · log · contact

first post!

April 3, 2026

so…what do i do?

i’m not sure. i’ll take it one step at a time and see where i go. this is the beginning of something. maybe a blog, maybe a log, maybe just a place to put things that don’t fit anywhere else.

testing markdown

this is exciting! here’s what i’ve figured out so far:

  • markdown is actually pretty intuitive once you stop fighting it
  • there are more options than you could even imagine
  • the hardest part is deciding what’s worth saying

the best time to start was yesterday. the second best time is now.

what’s next?

more posts, probably. better ones, hopefully. we’ll see what sticks.

def grow(seed, conditions):
    if conditions == "good":
        return seed * 2
    return seed
